name: cresset/magequery
description: A fast Magento 2 codebase inspector: DI resolution, plugins, events, cron, routes, config across scopes, and live DB introspection. Fetches a prebuilt Rust binary on demand.

suggest.ext-zip: Required to install on Windows (the binary ships as a .zip)

extra.comment: This manifest exists so Packagist can discover the package on the default (Rust) branch. Tagged releases (vX.Y.Z) are published from the orphan `composer` branch, which carries the same package flattened to the repo root (bin/magequery) with NO Rust source — see packaging/composer/ and scripts/publish-composer-branch.sh. Normal `composer require cresset/magequery` installs a tag, so it never downloads this branch's Rust tree.
